ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Secret used to log in to /admin.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Secret used to sign admin sessions and salt hashed visitor IP values.

SITE_OWNER_NAME.description: Public owner name shown on the landing page and resume viewer.

SITE_OWNER_TITLE.description: Public owner title shown on the resume viewer.

SITE_INTRO.description: Short intro text shown on the landing page and resume viewer.

ALLOW_DOWNLOAD_BUTTON.description: Set to true to show the public Download PDF button.

LINK_EXPIRE_DAYS.description: Default share-link expiration offset in days for the admin form.

DB.description: D1 database for share links, settings, and access events.

RESUME_BUCKET.description: R2 bucket that stores the active resume PDF.
